source_refs: Project evidence: homepage Mission tab image role
mission.business_goal: Support the Mission tab with a compact, trustworthy engineering image that reinforces stable delivery and system discipline
mission.page_role: Homepage Mission tabs square image - mission state
mission.visual_message: A focused engineering action or equipment interaction that feels capable, disciplined, and operational
mission.iteration_hypothesis: A tighter single-subject engineering image will reinforce the mission tab better than a wide environmental scene

technical_signals.motion_rule: still or nearly still action, no dramatic motion

spatial_positioning: subject fills the square crop cleanly
tooling or control surface can support context
image must remain readable in a compact square frame
mission.color_restriction: restrained industrial neutrals with controlled worksite accents only; avoid neon and hyper-saturation

composition_rule.focal_structure: one dominant subject with minimal background noise

source_refs: Project evidence: homepage Join Us tab image role
join-us.business_goal: Support the Join Us collaboration state with a people-forward but still credible engineering image
join-us.page_role: Homepage Mission tabs square image - join-us state
join-us.visual_message: A collaborative engineering or technical subject that signals partnership, alignment, and field-ready teamwork

reference_roles.image_1: subject crop and human scale reference

join-us.iteration_hypothesis: A more collaborative technical subject will strengthen the Join Us state without drifting into generic recruiting stock

technical_signals.light_source: soft controlled industrial or workshop light
technical_signals.motion_rule: calm and grounded, no exaggerated action pose

spatial_positioning: subject remains primary in a square crop
technical environment supports the story without taking over
facial or posture cues should read collaborative rather than salesy
image must stay clean and credible at small size
join-us.color_restriction: restrained industrial neutrals with controlled human warmth; avoid fashion editorial or neon looks

composition_rule.focal_structure: one primary human subject with a clear support layer
